# Sequence 1: Village Morning

## Scene Structure
Aira wakes in her modest home. She goes about her morning routine,
hinting at the village's relationship with the fading magic through
small details (dimming crystals, wilting enchanted plants).

## Purpose
- Establish setting and protagonist
- Show "normal world" before inciting incident
- Plant subtle hints about magic's decline

## Characters
- Aira (POV)
- Village elder Maren (brief appearance)

## Tone
Peaceful but tinged with melancholy
